Features

Streamline is built on the habits that make the best product teams successful

About usPricingFAQBlogContact

All Your Financial Accounts in One Unified Dashboard

Aggregate every bank, subsidiary, and currency in real time. Monitor balances, track cash flow, and gain actionable insights—all without juggling multiple logins.

Powering the world's best.

Unified Balance Overview

View your total balance across all banks and see exactly how each resource is allocated with intuitive pie- and bar-chart visualizations.

Read more

Unified Balance Overview

View your total balance across all banks and see exactly how each resource is allocated with intuitive pie- and bar-chart visualizations.

Read more

Comprehensive Transaction Ledger

Drill into each transaction—date, amount, payee, category—and use filters to trace cash flow with pinpoint accuracy.

Read more

Initiate Transfers

Set up one‑off or recurring transfers in seconds: choose source and destination accounts, enter the amount, schedule a date, and add an optional note.

Read more

Generate & Export Reports

Export tailored financial reports to CSV or PDF so you can share insights with stakeholders or meet compliance requirements effortlessly.

Read more

See Every Dollar, Understand Every Trend, and Act with Unmatched Speed

Our unified dashboard brings all your accounts, currencies, and subsidiaries into a single panoramic view—updated in real time.

Click-Through Detail

Drill from high-level numbers straight into the underlying transactions, filters, and audit trail.

One-Click Transfers

Move funds between accounts (or currencies) in less than ten seconds—no separate portal required.

Smart Alerts & Insights

Set thresholds once and get proactive nudges when balances dip, spikes occur, or FX moves against you.

Enterprise-Grade Security

AES-256 encryption, SOC 2 Type II compliance, and MFA baked in to keep every action—and every dollar—safe.

Global Reach, Local Clarity

Every dot on the map marks a secure, real-time connection to one of your banks or subsidiaries. Live data streams across borders and currencies—35+ and counting—so FinSight can unify balances in seconds and give you the global context you need to act with confidence.

Ready to Gain Complete Financial Clarity?
